articles.title: TOKENIZE YOUR REAL-WORLD ASSETS WITH HEDERA
articles.summary: Unlock liquidity and create thriving tokenized economies with Hedera [4]. From regulated security tokens to NFTs, Hedera is the best way to turn your real-world and digital assets [4] into diverse tokenized assets. → $8B+ Ecosystem market cap

articles.title: ETHEREUM FOUNDATION REMOVES WARRANT CANARY AFTER ‘VOLUNTARY ENQUIRY FROM A STATE AUTHORITY’
articles.summary: The Ethereum Foundation has reportedly received a confidential inquiry from a state authority, resulting in the removal of its warrant canary from the organization's website. The Foundation, a non-profit that supports Ethereum without directly controlling it, has mistakenly removed the warrant canary once before in 2019. Ethereum showed little reaction in price to the news. Experts suggest such inquiries are fairly common in the crypto industry.

articles.title: COINBASE FILES TO LIST DOGE, LTC, AND BCH FUTURES TRADING
articles.summary: Coinbase has applied to the CFTC to list Litecoin, Bitcoin Cash, and Dogecoin futures trading. Should the CFTC give the green light, these digital asset products could be available for trading as early as April 1. The move marks a significant step towards further legitimacy for these cryptocurrencies.

articles.title: ROBINHOOD ROLLS OUT CRYPTO WALLET TO ANDROID USERS GLOBALLY
articles.summary: Robinhood has officially released its crypto wallet app for Android users worldwide. The move follows the company's successful debut of the wallet to iOS users last year. This comes as Robinhood saw a 10% YoY increase in its crypto business and an 89% uptick in its notional crypto trading volume.

articles.title: STARKNET, AN ETHEREUM LAYER 2, PLANS 'PARALLEL EXECUTION' TO MIMIC SOLANA'S SPEED FEATURE
articles.summary: Starknet, an Ethereum L2, is planning to add a "parallelization" feature as part of a Q2 upgrade. The addition aims to increase transaction processing efficiency, resulting in better throughput and transaction finality. This comes as a part of Starknet's 2024 roadmap, which includes steps to curtail fees. Notably, Starknet is the largest network in the ZK rollups category of L2 networks, which are designed for quicker settlements based on zero-knowledge cryptography.

articles.title: THE UNDERVALUED LIDO OF BITCOIN
articles.summary: Activity in the Bitcoin ecosystem has picked up since the announcements and launches of the spot Bitcoin ETFs. Projects such as Babylon Chain are innovating, creating a way to generate additional yield for Bitcoin holdings through staking and validating Proof of Stake chains. Meanwhile, new and innovative projects like Ankr are entering the market with offerings like Liquid Staked Bitcoin.

articles.title: BULLISH BRAINDUMP ON BASE
articles.summary: This thread explores the growth and potential of the Ethereum L2 Base. It asserts that Base differentiates itself as a 'builder chain'. While Base was relatively slow to gain traction, the current uptick in speculative activity, especially in memecoins, interest in the ecosystem has been increasing significantly. The affordable gas fees and increasing user base present ample opportunities for developers to build applications.

articles.title: ON THE ETH MISINFORMATION
articles.summary: Since the SEC allowed the ETH Futures ETFs to trade on its regulated security exchanges, it implicitly agreed ETH is a non-security and not under SEC jurisdiction. This move, made after Ethereum transitioned to a Proof of Stake model in 2022, suggests any delay or denial towards an ETH ETF would be contradictory to the agency’s past actions, as the SEC has indicated Ethereum is beyond its jurisdiction.

articles.title: FED CHAIR POWELL: NO ’SECRET LAB’ BREWING A DIGITAL DOLLAR SURPRISE
articles.summary: Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell has dismissed rumors that the bank is secretly developing a CBDC, stating that no decision has been made on whether the US should proceed with such a project. However, Powell confirmed the bank is closely monitoring developments in the digital asset space.

articles.title: TON FOUNDATION LAUNCHES TONCOIN COMMUNITY REWARDS INITIATIVE WORTH OVER $100 MILLION
articles.summary: The TON Foundation launched The Open League, a $115+ million Toncoin rewards initiative for ecosystem growth featuring competitions, airdrops, and more starting in April.

articles.title: MEMECOIN MANIA HITS SOLANA
articles.summary: Solana's rise in popularity, driven by memecoins, surging metrics, and excitement around upcoming airdrops and ecosystem growth, is causing network congestion.

articles.title: NON-FINANCIAL APPS ON BASE
articles.summary: This thread lists some of Jesse Pollak’s (the creator of Base) favorite non-financial apps on the chain, which include projects such as Blackbird and Parallel.

articles.title: ANOTHER CRYPTOPUNKS NFT JUST SOLD FOR $16 MILLION IN ETHEREUM
articles.summary: An alien CryptoPunks NFT sold for $16 million, marking the second-largest sale in the collection’s history.
